description_zh: 創造天地萬物的神，創世記中的核心角色。
description_en: The Creator of heaven and earth, the central figure of Genesis.
visual_prompt: radiant warm golden light, gentle glowing presence, no depicted human face or body, soft rays of light, warm and comforting
appearance_notes: 以光與溫暖光暈表現神的臨在，不描繪具體人形樣貌，各 scene 維持一致的金黃色調；繪本風格字詞已抽離到 prompts/style/，這裡只保留角色本身的外觀描述
